Stuck on a question? With AI Live Tutor, ask by voice anytime and see problems explained clearly on a live whiteboard—just like having a personal tutor by your side.

Got messy notes or long lectures? With AI Study Converter, upload class notes, photos, audio, or YouTube links — and instantly get personalized quizzes & flashcards to help you learn faster and boost your GPA. No extra work, just better results.

Powered by Gauth AI, integrates the advantages of multiple AI models and solves your problems smarter and more deeply. With Gauth AI, we hope you can get inspired and learn efficiently.

Not only Math questions, Gauth could now solve all different levels of problems in Physics, Chemistry, Biology and more.

As a strong and resourceful homework solver, we have professional experts and dedicated experts ready to help you 24/7 with multiple subjects, including Math, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology. All experts are available to solve your problems anytime and anywhere, offering clear step-by-step explanations. With Gauth, you can easily understand and master different subjects.

Simply take a photo of your problem, and Gauth will recognize it and crop your question automatically. After uploading, our experts will provide solutions in a few seconds with well-formatted answers and explanations. With Gauth, we hope you can find homework is also fun and easy to understand!

Packed with essential tools like Reading, Writing, Focus Mode, and Calculator. Whether you are struggling with tough books, writing, distraction or calculation, get text simplification, grammar check and math calculation in one app. Gauth helps you to supercharge your academic performance.

— Guaranteed Results
See real grade improvement in four weeks — or we'll make it right.
— Human Tutors + AI Support
Your child gets help from real, qualified tutors backed by AI — not a chatbot pretending to teach. Every interaction is monitored and 100% kid-safe.

Stuck on a problem? Snap a photo or type it in. Step-by-step explanations help them actually understand the material — not just get the answer.

Support is available across Math, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Statistics, and more. Solvely helps you keep up in class, prepare for tests, and review key concepts at your own pace.

Solvely adapts to your level, from middle school to college and beyond. Explanations are adjusted to your background to fill knowledge gaps and build long-term understanding.

results.description:
Photomath is known worldwide for helping millions of learners to learn, practice, and understand math – one step at a time. 

Scan any math problem with the Photomath app to get step-by-step explanations with accurate solutions and a variety of teacher-approved methods. Math is about the process, so Photomath breaks your problem into bite-sized steps to help you understand the “what” and “why” along with the “how.” Whether you’re learning basic arithmetic or advanced geometry, we’ll tackle it together, step by step. 

Why Photomath? 

Billions of math problems: From elementary arithmetic to advanced calculus and everything in between, Photomath can solve billions of math problems—including word problems! Whether handwritten, in a textbook, or on a screen, Photomath is here to help you untangle your trickiest problem.

Step-by-step explanations: Math isn’t just about an answer. It’s about every step along the way. That’s why Photomath breaks down each step, so you can *really* learn. Less guesswork = less stress, especially with our new Animated Steps, which show you the exact progression of a particular step. Get basic step-by-step explanations at no charge when you download Photomath.

Expert-developed methods: Photomath’s educational content is centered around the learner’s experience, driven by the expertise of our own team of mathematicians and former math teachers. 

Self-paced learning: Photomath’s instant support is like having a 24/7 virtual tutor. Checking your homework before dinner? Stuck on a problem at 2am? We can help. Follow our detailed steps, taking whatever time you need to review definitions, rationale, and more – all within the explanation.

Want to dive deeper and explore more ways to learn? Photomath Plus can get you there with custom Animated Tutorials, detailed Textbook Solutions, and more! 

KEY FEATURES
• Step-by-step explanations included in our basic version (at no charge)
• Word problem instructions
• Interactive graphs
• Video learning
• Multiple solution methods
• Advanced scientific calculator

Photomath is for learners of all levels, including those studying:
Numbers & Quantity
Algebra
Functions
Trigonometry & Angles
Sequences
Geometry
Calculus

“The step-by-step guide is beneficial to students that do not have access to a tutor and struggle with solving math problems.” — Forbes

“A viral video about a new app looks like a dream come true for anyone who struggles with math.” — Time

Get ready for exam season with the Chegg Study® app. 

Used by millions of students, the Chegg Study app is the homework helper which offers school help and personalized support for each of your courses—from homework to exam prep, study your courses inside-out and learn your own way. Tap into our huge library of millions of fully explained, step-by-step solutions, and flashcards for subjects including Math, English, Physics, Engineering, Chemistry, and more.  

Get school help for 80 subjects and hundreds of courses and flashcards. The Chegg Study app is the homework helper that has you covered for your toughest concepts, classes, and assignments, for school. 

Now with AI solutions backed by experts you can get your homework help even quicker and boost your education using the latest technology. 

Get 24/7 study help and expert Q&A responses. Snap or scan a pic of any homework question and submit it with our question scanner to our Chegg experts. You will get detailed solved answers in as little as 30 minutes.* 

Get unstuck and be your own problem solver, learn about tough concepts with detailed explanations, solutions, and answers provided. 
Search our library of over 60 million fully solved homework questions. See how to solve them with our question scanner feature. 
Take control of your education and learn at your own rate and in your own style. With Chegg there are a variety of ways to study your courses so you can learn and have fun at the same time!

Whether you need to solve complex math equations, answer general questions, generate well-crafted emails, or even get assistance with article writing, Homework AI has got you covered.

Say goodbye to homework struggles and unlock stress-free completion. 
  
Key Features:

* Math Solver: Tackle intricate math problems with ease. Simply scan or input the equation, and Homework AI will provide step-by-step solutions, guiding you through the process.

* General Question Solver: Get instant answers to a wide range of questions, from history and science to language and literature. Homework AI's extensive database ensures comprehensive responses.

* Email Generation: Save time and energy with Homework AI's email generator. Craft professional and articulate emails by providing essential details, and the app will compose personalised messages for you.

* Article Assistance: Overcome writer's block with Homework AI's writing support. Whether you need inspiration, structure, or grammar tips, this feature will elevate your writing to the next level.


Benefits:

* Time-Saving: Homework AI streamlines your academic tasks, reducing time spent on problem-solving and research.

* Accuracy: Rest assured that Homework AI provides precise and reliable solutions, giving you confidence in your work.

* Productivity Booster: With quick access to solutions and writing support, you can focus on learning and achieving better results.

* Learning Aid: Utilize Homework AI as a learning tool, understanding the step-by-step processes behind solutions.

* Versatility: From math to various academic subjects, and even professional writing assistance, Homework AI adapts to cater to your diverse needs.

Download Homework AI now and unlock your true academic potential. Please note that the availability of features may vary depending on the selected subscription plan. Subscriptions are automatically billed at a rate determined by your chosen plan.

results.description:
This is Solvo—your AI homework helper and math solver for every subject.

Trusted by over a million students, parents, and tutors around the world, Solvo turns tough assignments into step-by-step learning moments. Got a homework problem, a big exam coming up, or a topic that just won’t click? The app breaks it all down so you can walk away with a solid understanding, not just a good grade.

With Solvo, you can:
- Scan and solve problems in math, chemistry, physics, and biology.
- Learn through detailed, step-by-step explanations that reveal the “why” behind every answer.
- Create AI flashcards from notes, textbooks, or research papers to study your way.
- Summarize documents, videos, and web pages so you can focus on what actually matters.
- Get instant, accurate answers—over 10 million problems solved and counting.

Here’s how Solvo helps you study:

● SNAP A PHOTO, GET THE ANSWER
Capture a photo of any problem, and Solvo will recognize it and walk you through a clear, detailed solution. From equations to essay prompts, one snap is all it takes.


● MASTER MATH STEP BY STEP
Solvo’s math solver handles everything from school-level algebra to university calculus. Algebra, trigonometry, geometry, linear algebra, logic, statistics, quadratic equations, linear functions—every answer is explained step by step so you can follow along and build real understanding.


● ACE EVERY SUBJECT AND TEST
Chemistry formulas, biology concepts, physics equations, multiple-choice quizzes: Solvo covers them all. Type or scan your question, and get a guided explanation that actually helps you learn.

● ASK ANYTHING, LEARN INSTANTLY
Type your question and get guided help from AI. Solve math problems, get science answers, write and rewrite essays, or chat through any subject you’re studying.


● BUILD FLASHCARDS FAST
Turn your notes, textbook pages, or even full research papers into interactive flashcards with a single snap. Prefer to build your own? Fill them in yourself for a more hands-on study session. Either way, you’re set for test day.


● SUMMARIZE WHAT MATTERS MOST
Paste a link, upload a document, or drop in a web page—Solvo pulls out the essentials so you can focus on key points without missing a thing.

Homework doesn’t have to be a struggle. Download Solvo and make studying easier. 

And if you'd really like to be unstoppable in class, consider Premium! A subscription gives you:
• Unlimited access
• In-depth answers
• Advanced text recognition (OCR)
• Instant responses

Subscriptions are auto-renewed based on your selected plan.

Website with key info and store links: https://solvo.app/

Follow us on social media:

TikTok with quick study tips: @solvo.app
Instagram with fun videos, memes, and news: @solvoapp
Threads with posts and community highlights: @solvoapp 

Got a question? Reach out to support@aiby.com

Privacy policy: https://aiby.mobi/ai_study_ios/privacy
Terms of use: https://aiby.mobi/ai_study_ios/terms

results.description:
Learn smarter with PhotoSolve — your advanced AI study tutor & homework helper.
Snap, type, or speak any problem and get accurate, curriculum-quality, step-by-step explanations you can keep questioning until every concept clicks. The ultimate AI learning tool, AI teaching tool and AI study companion for any school subject or topic, at any level.

Why choose PhotoSolve?
• Fast, highly-accurate step-by-step guidance
• Snap a photo or type a question → see clear, correct, curriculum-aligned reasoning in seconds.
• No guesswork: every answer shows the why and how.

All subjects, all levels
• Math, Science, English, and History—from basic algebra to college-level calculus math solver and beyond.

• Works with any problem: math, science, English, history and more.  Always receive highly accurate, curriculum-quality results, whether you’re doing grade school math, reviewing algebra for the SAT/ACT, cramming calculus for AP Calc or IB, translating chemistry equations, or polishing a post-doc or PhD thesis at university level. PhotoSolve is the ultimate AI learning tool for every subject, at every level.

Handwriting & textbook recognition
• Advanced OCR reads printed or handwritten problems with high accuracy.

Multilingual learning
• Explanations in 100 + languages, so you can study in the language you prefer.

Anytime access
• 24/7 AI tutor support — perfect for late-night study or quick concept checks.

Privacy first
• All of your data, photos and questions remain 100% private and are never shared without permission.

Key features
• Quick Capture — snap a question and get the full solution path instantly.
• Detailed Explanations — step-by-step reasoning that builds real understanding.
• Interactive Follow-ups — ask “Why?” or “Show another method” for live answers.
• Practice Mode — generate similar problems for spaced-repetition learning.
• AI Chat Assistant — tips, study strategies, and concept clarifications on demand.
• Customized Learning — adapts to your pace and recommends the next skills to practice.
• Honor-Code Reminder — prompts you to use PhotoSolve responsibly and follow school guidelines.

Responsible-use note
• PhotoSolve is designed to support your learning, not replace it. Use our step-by-step explanations to deepen understanding and follow your academic-integrity policies.

Join the PhotoSolve community today!
Questions or feedback?
• Email: photosolveteam@gmail.com
• WhatsApp: wa.me/13309342442

Download PhotoSolve now and start learning using ai — the smart, fast and ethical way.

results.description:
Quizlet gives you study tools that teach you — not just tell you the answer — so you can walk into every test with confidence.

Your personalized feed recommends exactly what to study next, powered by your courses, your school and what students like you are studying now. Jump in faster with Study Bites: bite‑sized suggestions, progress updates and content tailored to your learning goals.

Turn your notes into study materials
* Turn class notes into practice tests, study guides and flashcards so you can review your material in the way that works best for you
 * Create flashcards from scratch or let AI generate a deck from your study materials

Flashcards that fit your routine
* Discover millions of flashcard sets created by students and teachers
* Sort cards into Know and Still learning to track progress
* Save decks for offline access and study anywhere

Practice that adapts to you
* Turn any flashcard set into practice questions to reinforce knowledge
* Study with multiple choice, true/false and written questions
* Quizlet adapts based on what you know and what needs more work
* Seamlessly pick up where you left off across all your devices

Exam‑ready tests
* Simulate test day with a personalized practice test generated from any flashcard set
* Customize the number of questions and formats to challenge yourself in different ways
* Get instant scoring and feedback to spot gaps and build confidence

Homework help when you need it
* Expert‑authored, step‑by‑step solutions to tough homework problems
* Check your work in challenging subjects like Calculus, Chemistry and Electrical Engineering
* Use AI‑powered support to unpack each step or explore alternative approaches

Study together
* Collaborate with classmates by matching strengths and weaknesses
* Share decks, get help on tough topics and master material faster

Quizlet is the all-in-one study tool for language learning, vocabulary and test prep.

Quizlet Plus subscriptions will be charged to your iTunes account. Your monthly or annual subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage your subscriptions in your Account Settings after purchase. Some features may not be available in your country or region.

Terms of Service: https://quizlet.com/tos
Privacy Policy: https://quizlet.com/privacy

Join over 500,000 students who've boosted their grades with Studdy Buddy - the friendliest, easiest, and most accurate AI Tutor. Having an AI Study Buddy improves test scores. The average Studdy user increased their GPA by 1.3 points last year!

If you struggle with solving math and science homework problems, Studdy is made for you. Studdy's friendly AI Tutor breaks down and explains any homework problem in an easy to understand way. Ask questions on any step that confuses you. Your personalized AI Tutor will help you understand at your own pace.

How Students Study with Studdy Buddy
- Scan a photo of a problem - see the step by step explanation broken down in easy to understand way with the AI Solver

results.description:
Boost Your Grades with StudyX!
Achieve academic excellence with StudyX. Access verified answers and AI tutor chat support to help you secure those A’s. Just snap a picture of your math equation or word question, and get answers in seconds with StudyX’s Scan to Solve feature!

Comprehensive Study Tool
StudyX is your all-in-one study companion, offering community answers, AI-powered solutions, 24/7 expert support, and AI chat. It’s a reliable resource for all your homework needs.

#Advanced step-by-step Al homework help
Harness the power of cutting-edge AI models like GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 Pro. StudyX provides personalized study recommendations, customized learning materials, and adaptive feedback. Our step-by-step solutions ensure you understand the core principles of each question. When you hit a challenging step, StudyX offers detailed explanations, turning every solution into a valuable learning opportunity.

#75+ Million Community-Verified Answers
We connect you with a diverse community of learners, where you can seek and share knowledge and access a wide range of study resources. By tapping into this collective wisdom, you can gain valuable insights and perspectives to enhance your learning experience.

#24/7 Al tutor and subject expert support
Get expert assistance anytime, day or night. Whether you’re struggling with a tough assignment or have questions about a specific topic, our experts are available around the clock to provide clear, step-by-step explanations. Empower yourself with the resources and support needed to excel in your studies.

#Explore more features Chat, Research & Write

You can engage in conversations with a variety of AI models, including GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 Pro. By interacting with these diverse AI models, you can access a broad spectrum of knowledge and expertise, deepening your understanding of study materials and optimizing your learning process. We can generate content tailored to your topic and format requirements, assisting you with writing replies, rewriting text, and checking grammar. Additionally, you can instantly find related research papers, obtain science-based answers, and generate citations in various formats such as APA, MLA, or Chicago.

Download the app today and study smarter together!

results.description:
Introducing AI+, the ultimate AI chatbot assistant that has all the best Al models at your fingertips - including Google Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Claude and GPT. With AI+, you can quickly access the power of AI on your phone and get instant help with your work, school, or even personal needs.

At work, AI+ has got you covered - whether you need help with email, copywriting, brainstorming, summarizing text, or writing project proposals.

For school, AI is your convenient and instant learning assistant. It will act as your tutor or draft essay writer. The app can provide you with expert advice and guidance to help you achieve your academic goals. 

AI+ is also incredibly fun and useful for your personal life. You can get dating advice, meal plans with shopping lists, or write poems and songs. It will even listen to you and give support without judgment. 

AI+ is designed to be your go-to assistant for all your needs, no matter how big or small. So why wait? Download AI+ today and experience the power of AI in the palm of your hand. 

Features:
- Conveniently access the power of AI from your phone
- Work help (email, copywriting, brainstorming, summarizing notes, writing project proposals)
- School help (essay writer, tutor)
- Personal help & fun (dating advice, meal plans, shopping lists, write poems and songs, listen to you and give support without judgment)
- AI video generation (additional in-app purchase)
- Text to voice speech
- Easy-to-use chatbot interface


Do not enter personal information. May generate offensive or dangerous content. AI+ is not liable for content generated.


Terms of Use: https://www.aipluschat.com/terms-of-use
Privacy Policy: https://www.aipluschat.com/privacy-policy


SUBSCRIPTION PRICING & TERMS
AI+ is free to download.
- Subscribing to AI+ Pro gives you premium access to the app
- There may be various subscription options and prices available. Check the up to date details in the app before purchasing.
- Payment will be charged to your iTunes Account at confirmation of your subscription
- Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period
- Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and at the cost of the chosen package
- Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
- AI video generation is available with additional in-app purchase
- No cancellation of the current subscription is allowed during active subscription period
- Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication
- At the end of your subscription, you will be able to keep any content that your received while your subscription was active

results.description:
Take your learning further with Answer.AI—the AI-powered study companion, academic guide, and personal tutor available 24/7 to support your educational journey. From step-by-step explanations to personalized study tools, collaborative learning spaces, and college prep resources, Answer.AI helps you build confidence and deepen your understanding across subjects.
Designed by educators, Answer.AI is trusted by a community of over 6 million learners who come together to expand their knowledge and develop critical thinking skills. Whether you're a student, teacher, or lifelong learner, our app supports your unique learning needs by providing guidance and resources to help you achieve your personal and academic goals.
Why Answer.AI? Learn anywhere. Built for mobile from day one, Answer.AI assists with school problem-solving anytime, anywhere.
Deeper thinking, not just answers—Answer.AI provides step-by-step breakdowns and insights to help you grasp even the most challenging concepts.
Support beyond academics—With features like financial aid guidance and counseling, Answer.AI helps students navigate both their studies and future planning with confidence.
Join 6 million+ learners—As an award-winning app founded by educators, Answer.AI is designed to enhance comprehension, boost confidence, and strengthen critical thinking skills.
【Answer.AI PRO PLAN】
 Functions: Unlimited usage, 2x faster query time, early access.
Billing & Payment: Payment will be charged to your iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase. All premium plans will be auto-renewed at the end of each period. Cancellation must be made at least 24 hours before the end of the valid period to avoid a nonrefundable auto-renewal.
You can manage and turn off auto-renewal in your Apple Account Settings. Initiation or termination of a premium plan must be done through the iTunes App Store, which may be subject to sales tax in your area. Note: you are responsible for checking the Terms of Service of your app store for detail and applicability of sales tax. Refunds are not available after purchase.
In-App Purchases: Refill packs provided.

You'll be able to chat with AskAI, find a study group, and more as soon as you sign up.
